actions.text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.

official_title: To award posthumously a Congressional Gold Medal to Bonnie Eloise Rush Milam in recognition of her distinguished service to the United States Armed Forces through the Melody Maids and her lifelong contributions to patriotism, music education, and the leadership development of young women in the United States.
short_title: Bonnie Eloise Rush Milam Congressional Gold Medal Act of 2026

titles.title: Bonnie Eloise Rush Milam Congressional Gold Medal Act of 2026
Bonnie Eloise Rush Milam Congressional Gold Medal Act of 2026

To award posthumously a Congressional Gold Medal to Bonnie Eloise Rush Milam in recognition of her distinguished service to the United States Armed Forces through the Melody Maids and her lifelong contributions to patriotism, music education, and the leadership development of young women in the United States.
